description: SPARC 5-phase TDD pipeline: Specification → Pseudocode → Architecture → Refinement → Completion

panes.name: CEO
panes.focus: Orchestrate SPARC phases, gate between phases, aggregate outputs

panes.name: Specification
panes.focus: Define testable requirements, acceptance criteria, edge cases

panes.name: Pseudocode
panes.focus: Design algorithms and data structures, validate feasibility

panes.name: Architecture
panes.focus: Define system components, service boundaries, typed interfaces

panes.name: Completion
panes.focus: E2E tests, security hardening, performance, deployment readiness
